//: Sample configuration for the FactoryOS connector platform. Bind the 'Connectors' section into appsettings. Discovery scans RootPath's immediate subfolders for connector.json manifests; Health governs heartbeat/failure detection. Per-connector settings live under 'Connectors:Configuration:<key>' where the 'Enabled' key toggles the connector (default true). Secret settings are prefixed 'enc:' and decrypted with Security.EncryptionKey — the key is a SECRET supplied out-of-band (environment, user-secrets, or a ${secret:...} placeholder), NEVER committed. Without a key, settings are treated as plaintext.
